workflows.name: Competition Batch Submit
workflows.description: End-to-end pipeline: research competitions, score, detect style, route to writer, review, and submit entries

steps.label: Research Competitions
steps.sop: Scrape competition aggregators, extract structured data (title, prize, deadline, requirements, URL). Deduplicate via REL entity graph.

steps.label: Score & Rank
steps.sop: Score each competition by prize_value/effort/odds/deadline/fit. Filter to 5.0+ composite score only. Rank by score descending.

steps.label: Detect Required Style
steps.sop: Analyze competition requirements and tag each with a style: humorous, professional, fiction, sad, narrative, or persuasive. Style tag determines writer routing.

steps.label: Route to Writer
steps.sop: Route each competition to the appropriate style writer agent based on style tag. humorous → system-content-humorous-v1, professional → system-content-professional-v1, fiction → system-content-fiction-v1, sad → system-content-sad-v1, narrative → system-content-narrative-v1, persuasive → system-content-persuasive-v1. Writer produces draft saved to staging/.

steps.label: Review & Approve
steps.sop: Human reviews all drafts in staging/. Check: meets word count, matches competition requirements, quality bar met, style appropriate. Approve, request edits, or reject.

steps.label: Submit Entries
steps.sop: For each approved entry: navigate to submission URL, fill form via Playwright, upload files, screenshot before and after submit, log confirmation. Only submit entries with status: approved.
